cases.description: Run the generated spel-orchestrator on a minimal automation request and expect a handoff artifact or a classified runtime block.
cases.message: Create orchestration/automation-pipeline.json with status blocked and next_step 'need URL'. Do not browse. Keep it minimal.

cases.description: Run the generated spel-orchestrator on a minimal discovery request and expect a machine-readable discovery handoff or a classified runtime block.
cases.message: Create orchestration/discovery-pipeline.json with status blocked and next_step 'need URL'. Do not browse. Keep it minimal.

cases.description: Run a real page eval through orchestrator using spel CLI on https://example.com and require machine-readable outputs.
cases.message: Use spel CLI to evaluate https://example.com. Capture page title and URL into eval-artifacts/example-page.json. Also write orchestration/automation-pipeline.json with status completed and next_step done. Use bash/python for file writes (do not use apply_patch).

cases.description: Run a light QA page eval through orchestrator and require QA handoff artifact for example.com.
cases.message: Do a quick QA check on https://example.com using spel CLI. Write eval-artifacts/qa-summary.md with at least one finding line, and write orchestration/qa-pipeline.json with status completed and next_step done. Use bash/python for file writes (do not use apply_patch).
